# this might not be the latest changelog for the tweak version!

* this only grabs from releases/latest as there is no changelog in actions. to check if it is newer than the release, go to commits in the original repo @ [GitHub](https://github.com/jaydenjcpy/EeveeSpotifyReincarnated) :P
---
### original changelog:

# Release Notes:

Improved :
- Support for Spotify 9.1.56
- LRCLIB lyrics

New Icons:
- EvilSpotify 
- SpotifyMonochrome
- Greenify
- Eevify
- SmallvileSpotify
- MikuSpotify
- SpotifyDarkBlue
- SpotifyDeepGreen
- SpotifyFrieren
- Supermanify

Patched vs Not Patched
Use patched if you use a paid cert or troll store

Use the non patched one for other methods like Sideloadly/Altstore/Sidestore

Credits for this update:

[Ryuk](https://github.com/faroukbmiled) 

[Mod4](https://github.com/M0d-4) 

[estrogencat](https://github.com/estrogencat)

TrollFools .zip by [iOSVN](https://t.me/ioscrackvn)

**Join [TG channel](https://t.me/compiledipas) to recieve news on developement**

**VIEW TXT FILE**

### original changelog:

# Release Notes:

Improved :
- Support for Spotify 9.1.50
- Improved AdBlocking
- CarPlay functionality

New Features:
- App Icon Switcher
- SponsorBlock
- All lyric Providers working again
- True Shuffle

Patched vs Not Patched
Use patched if you use a paid cert or troll store

Use the non patched one for other methods like Sideloadly/Altstore/Sidestore

Credits for this update:

[Ryuk](https://github.com/faroukbmiled) - True Shuffle, App Icon, crash fixes

[Mod4](https://github.com/M0d-4) - Custom Lyrics, iPadUI fix 

[estrogencat](https://github.com/estrogencat) - Icon Fixes 



**Join [TG channel](https://t.me/compiledipas) to recieve more frequent updates**

**Orion Framework is provided in Orion.zip for those who need it**
